creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Shaun Amott schrieb:

> I removed NO_PACKAGE/NO_LATEST_LINK, because being unstable/beta
> is not a valid reason to skip building a package.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=101802

Well... NO_LATEST_LINK should remain there, we don't want betas
installed if users type "pkg_add -r".
